_doc.purpose: Per-name delivery-point configuration. Scene placeholders named DeliveryPoint_<KEY> resolve to the entry under <KEY> here. Missing entries are logged and ignored.
_doc.naming: Scene placeholder asset_key 'DeliveryPoint_My_Cool_Spot' looks up KEY 'My_Cool_Spot'. The in-game label defaults to KEY with underscores replaced by spaces ('My Cool Spot'), capped at 14 chars (source label byte budget).
_doc.auto_derived: source_class, source_actor, target_class, target_path are auto-generated by the framework — JSON only carries user intent.

fields.label: Optional in-game name. Default: KEY with '_' -> ' '. Max 14 chars (Farm_Corn vanilla label byte budget).
fields.recipes: List of production configs. Each entry: { inputs:{Cargo:Count}, outputs:{Cargo:Count}, input_types:[Type|...], output_types:[Type|...], speed:Float, time_seconds:Float }. All fields optional. Recipe with no inputs = timed background production. input_types/output_types use EDeliveryCargoType enum (None, SmallPackage, LargePackage, Food, Furniture, Container, Stone, Log, FinalProduct, Sand, Garbage, Wood, Coal, Concrete, MilitarySupply).
fields.marker_color: Future: hex color for the world-map marker.
fields.icon: Future: /Game/... path for the marker icon.

TransformerFarm.label: TransformerFarm
TransformerFarm._note: marker_color / icon mutation not yet wired in MTBPInjector — see AGENTS.md 'Marker / Icon Mutation (Pending)'. Fields kept here as user intent for future implementation.
